lastStrategyDecision.reason: Market evidence is low-conviction for automated intraday entries: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 offers no participation edge, averageGapPercent is slightly negative (-0.3%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~52 is only moderate (higher slippage/stop uncertainty), and averageCatalystScore ~21.5 is weak (lower follow-through). While uptrendShare is decent (0.6) and data freshness is excellent (20/20), the overall tape quality does not justify new orders. Maintain a conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP framework with bracket exits for clear, auditable risk, but set directive to OBSERVE and plannedTradesToday to 0 until RVOL/liquidity/catalyst strength improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
